caption: A dark, purple-hued digital environment is filled with scattered data points, lines of code, and abstract geometric shapes. Small, glowing white and red particles drift across the space, creating a sense of depth and motion. A bright red light source appears in several areas, trailing a thin, luminous red line that streaks across the void. To the right, vertical columns of white and red code and technical text are visible, including phrases such as "printf", "if (n == 0)", and "int main()". Small square icons and data markers float near the edges of the screen. As the sequence progresses, the red streaks and particles shift positions, and the clusters of code and digital markers drift slightly, suggesting a camera moving through a three-dimensional virtual space of information.
